title.zh-TW: 知識透過連結而非積累

body.zh-TW: MemTrace 的核心前提：知識不需要存在於龐大的文件中。每個節點只捕捉一個想法，價值來自節點之間的連結網絡。節點本身輕量，但透過關聯性形成龐大的知識庫。知識庫的規模不是由單一節點的大小決定，而是由節點之間關係的密度與品質決定。
body.en: The core premise of MemTrace: knowledge does not need to live in large, monolithic documents. Each node captures one idea. Value emerges from the network of relationships between nodes. A node alone is lightweight; connected to others, it becomes part of a knowledge base whose scale is determined by the density and quality of its relationships, not the size of any single entry.
